title: Andonium
description: A Mod that adds a new ore called andonium
body:
## Andonium is a mod for minecraft that Adds new features.

These new features are 
- andonium ore
- andonoum
- the andonium pickaxe
- the andonium axe
- andonium armor
- hot chocolate
- vanilla beans
- vanilla extract
- butter
- marshmallows
- whipped cream

  
![What the mod adds so far.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4RJSghhC/images/c830d92486d61de1b4e06ce2d61b324e76edc20c_350.webp)
